purpose: Embedding vectors and cluster aggregation must be tuned together. This file records the active embedding-clustering threshold profile so future clustering-quality work starts from the right knob.

active_decision.summary: Use OpenRouter text-embedding-3-small for embedding, with a conservative Stage 1 cosine floor before cluster aggregation.

openrouter_text_embedding_3_small_conser.rationale: Conservative rollout profile. Keep 0.75 as the strong recall floor for precision, add 0.70-0.75 as a rule-gated gray band sent to LLM judge, and log 0.65-0.70 as shadow observations only.

openrouter_text_embedding_3_small_recall.rationale: Higher-recall candidate profile. The same offline test reached the best F1 at 0.70, but overmerged more than the conservative profile.
